sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
So after clicking (37, 41):
- The dot at (37, 41) became magenta 2x2 at (36, 40)
- The dots that disappeared: (40, 37) was gone (it was between the blue shape and (37, 41))
- Remaining sky blue dots: (54, 49), (55, 14), (56, 47), (57, 16)
So the pattern seems to be:
- Clicking on a sky blue dot turns it magenta (2x2)
- The next dot closer to the blue shape in that "arm" disappears
Original arms:
Left arm (from blue shape outward): (37, 18) → (41, 16) → (55, 14) → (57, 16)
Right arm: (37, 41) → (40, 37) → (54, 49) → (56, 47)
After clicking (37, 18): (41, 16) disappeared (next in left arm toward blue shape)
After clicking (37, 41): (40, 37) disappeared (next in right arm toward blue shape)
Wait, that doesn't make sense. The dots (37, 18) and (37, 41) are the closest to the blue shape. When I clicked them, the NEXT dots further away disappeared.
Actually, let me reconsider. The blue shape is at rows 23-29, cols 31-37. The dots are:
- (37, 18) - below and left of blue shape
- (37, 41) - below and right of blue shape
- (40, 37) - directly below blue shape
- (41, 16) - further below and left
- (54, 49) - far below and right
- (55, 14) - far below and left
- (56, 47) - far below and right
- (57, 16) - far below and left
Hmm, maybe the arms are:
Left arm: (37, 18) → (41, 16) → (55, 14) → (57, 16)
Right arm: (37, 41) → (40, 37) → (54, 49) → (56, 47)
Wait, (40, 37) is more central. Let me reconsider the grouping.
Actually, looking at the columns:
Left side (cols < 37): (37, 18), (41, 16), (55, 14), (57, 16)
Right side (cols >= 37): (37, 41), (40, 37), (54, 49), (56, 47)
When I clicked (37, 18) [left side], (41, 16) [next left side] disappeared.
When I clicked (37, 41) [right side], (40, 37) [next right side] disappeared.
So the pattern is: clicking on a dot in an arm removes the next dot in that arm (moving away from the blue shape). The clicked dot turns magenta.
Remaining dots:
Left: (55, 14), (57, 16)
Right: (54, 49), (56, 47)
I need to continue clicking on the remaining dots. But which order? Let me think...
If I click on (55, 14), it would turn magenta and (57, 16) would disappear.
If I click on (57, 16), it would turn magenta and... nothing after it?
Wait, maybe the mechanic is different. Let me think again:
- Original: 8 sky blue dots
- After 2 clicks: 2 magenta dots + 4 sky blue dots = 6 dots total (2 disappeared)
- Each click: 1 dot turns magenta, 1 dot disappears
So to clear all dots, I need to click on 4 dots (converting them to magenta) and 4 dots will disappear. But that would leave 4 magenta dots. Maybe the goal is to have all dots become magenta?
Or maybe I need to click on the remaining sky blue dots. Let me try clicking on all remaining sky blue dots.
Actually, wait. Let me reconsider the target action count: "about 42 target actions" for level 2. That's a lot! Maybe the mechanic involves many more steps.
Let me think about this differently. Maybe I need to click on the legend squares to change the "active color" and then click on dots to paint them different colors. The 42 actions might involve:
- Selecting colors from the legend
- Painting dots in specific patterns
But so far, clicking on dots has only turned them magenta. Let me try clicking on a legend square to see if that changes the active color.
